title: oxalis lanata
intro: Oxalis lanata is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae) that is native to Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of oxalic acid, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Oxalis lanata has been used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be consumed fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
